appears.text: That vessel has been pacing us for {n:5-20} miles. Same speed. Same lane changes. This is either coincidence or a rivalry. How do we respond?

wave-friend.text: Wave returned enthusiastically! They have a dog. The dog is also waving, in its way. Rivalry converted to alliance. Best outcome available in this sector.

wave-confusion.text: They did not see the wave. They saw the aftermath, and are now deeply unsettled. They've changed lanes. The rivalry is over. So is the friendship that never began.

race-win.text: Within legal limits, we have established gentle dominance. The rival has accepted second place with grace. The crew is quietly triumphant.

race-humble.text: They were not racing. They were just driving. We have been humbled by a stranger's indifference. Character: built.

ignore.text: We ignored them. They exited {n:2-9} miles later, unaware they were ever our rival. All rivalries are like this, if you think about it. Please don't.
